title: Genomics of pear and other Rosaceae fruit trees.
author: Yamamoto T Terakami S
content: S-EPMC4780798 PMC4780798 Genomics of pear and other Rosaceae fruit trees. The family Rosaceae includes many economically important fruit trees, such as pear, apple, peach, cherry, quince, apricot, plum, raspberry, and loquat. Over the past few years, whole-genome sequences have been released
